exercises.name: Barbell Back Squat
exercises.tip: The foundation of full-body training. Lower to parallel, drive through your heels.
formTips: Break at the hips and knees simultaneously
Knees out — push them into your elbows

exercises.name: Barbell Bench Press
exercises.tip: Compound press paired with the squat. Lower with control, press explosively.
formTips: Leg drive — push through your feet

exercises.name: Barbell Row
exercises.tip: Balance out all the pressing. Pull to your belly, squeeze your back.

exercises.name: Overhead Press
exercises.tip: Vertical pressing for shoulder development. Brace hard.

exercises.name: Romanian Deadlift
exercises.tip: Hip hinge to finish the session. Feel the hamstring stretch on every rep.

exercises.name: Deadlift
exercises.tip: Full body B centres around the deadlift. Everything else is accessory work.
formTips: Bar over mid-foot at setup — about 1 inch from shins

exercises.name: Incline Dumbbell Press
exercises.tip: Upper chest focus after heavy deadlifts. Lighter and more controlled than Day A pressing.
formTips: Lower slowly with a full stretch

exercises.name: Lat Pulldown
exercises.tip: Pull your elbows down and back. Lean slightly back and pull to your upper chest.
formTips: Arms fully extended at the top
Lead with elbows on the way down
Pull to upper chest — not behind the neck

exercises.name: Leg Press
exercises.tip: Quad work without the spinal load of squats — great after deadlifts.
formTips: Don't lock your knees at the top

exercises.name: Cable Lateral Raise
exercises.tip: Side delt isolation to finish. Light weight, high reps.
formTips: Control the lowering — don't let it swing back

exercises.name: Goblet Squat
exercises.tip: A lighter squat variation — great for depth and posture. Hold a dumbbell at your chest.
formTips: Hold dumbbell vertically at your chest
Elbows inside your knees at the bottom

exercises.name: Dumbbell Shoulder Press
exercises.tip: Dumbbell variation for shoulder pressing — more range of motion than a barbell.
formTips: Start at shoulder height, elbows at 90 degrees

exercises.name: Cable Seated Row
exercises.tip: Horizontal pulling to balance shoulder health. Focus on scapular retraction.
formTips: Squeeze shoulder blades at the end

exercises.name: Single-Leg Deadlift
exercises.tip: Unilateral hip hinge — challenges balance and builds each leg independently.
formTips: Slight bend in the standing knee
Hips stay square — don't let one side drop
Feel the stretch in your hamstring before driving back up

exercises.name: Dumbbell Curl
exercises.tip: Arm isolation to finish the week. Supinate and squeeze.

exercises.name: Tricep Pushdown
exercises.tip: Pair with curls for an arm finisher.
